amount_tiers_discount_percentage_range_c.name: amount_tiers_discount_percentage_range_chk
amount_tiers_discount_percentage_range_c.value:
"amount_tiers"."pricing_type" != 'discount'
      OR
      "amount_tiers"."value" BETWEEN 0 AND 100 -- pricing type is discount and discount type is percentage

order_bottles_bottle_type_alcohol_cons_c.name: order_bottles_bottle_type_alcohol_cons_chk
order_bottles_bottle_type_alcohol_cons_c.value:
"order_bottles"."bottle_type" != 'oil' OR (
        "order_bottles"."alcohol_amount" IS NULL AND
        "order_bottles"."ml_price_at_purchase" IS NULL AND
        "order_bottles"."ml_cost_at_purchase" IS NULL
      )

orders_shipping_req_chk.name: orders_shipping_req_chk
orders_shipping_req_chk.value:
"orders"."fulfillment_method" != 'delivery' OR (
        "orders"."shipping_country" IS NOT NULL AND
        "orders"."shipping_city"    IS NOT NULL AND
        "orders"."shipping_street"  IS NOT NULL
      )

perfumes_approved_chk.name: perfumes_approved_chk
perfumes_approved_chk.value:
NOT "perfumes"."approved"
      OR (
        "perfumes"."seasons" IS NOT NULL
        AND array_length("perfumes"."seasons", 1) > 0
        AND "perfumes"."sex" IS NOT NULL
        AND "perfumes"."description" != ''
      )
